sevenDayForecast.headline: Tropical low (02U) to develop early next week in the Timor Sea.
points: A tropical low may form to the south of the Indonesia during the weekend and move into the Timor Sea on Monday next week.
It is likely to become slow moving in the Timor Sea for most of next week, where environmental conditions are supportive for significant development.
The risk of 02U to develop into a tropical cyclone increases to Low on Monday, with increasing chance of development mid to late next week.
